commit.message:
Add personal best tracking with confetti animation

Backend:
- /api/submit now returns is_new_pb (bool) and prev_best, computed by
  combining COUNT+MAX into a single pre-insert query (no schema change)

Frontend:
- PB badge on each unlocked scene card (⭐ PB: 87%) using best_scores
  from userProgress, updates on every renderCards() call
- #pbBanner inside score panel — shows "⭐ New Personal Best!" when
  is_new_pb is true, gold animated pill with scale-in keyframe
- showPBBlast() — 70-piece CSS confetti burst + large gold text overlay,
  auto-removes after 3.2s; fires alongside the score panel banner
- Personal Bests section in My Progress modal: scenes sorted by best
  score descending, shows ↑ arrow when latest attempt beats previous one

commit.message:
Add friend challenge system

Backend:
- challenges table (challenge_id, challenger_username, scene_id, score_to_beat)
- POST /api/challenge — creates a challenge link, returns short hex ID + URL
- GET /api/challenge/{id} — returns challenge details (public, no auth)
- GET /challenge/{id} — SPA route: serves index.html so JS handles routing

Frontend:
- URL routing in boot: detects /challenge/[id] path, loads challenge screen
- #challengeScreen — full-page challenge card showing challenger, score, movie
- "Accept Challenge" button opens scene modal with challengeCtx set
- After scoring: showChallengeResult() shows YOU WON / So close overlay
- "⚔ Challenge a Friend" button in score panel → POST to create challenge
- Share panel: copy link + WhatsApp share button
- Login/register from challenge page flows back into challenge after auth

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: cap network hashrate crash alerts to once per 6 hours

feat: enable web search (DuckDuckGo, no API key needed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix 401 session recovery: save form data and auto-resubmit after re-auth

Users with expired/invalid tokens were losing their typed feedback on
submission failure. Now the client:
- Detects 401 on submission and saves form data to localStorage
- Redirects to sign-in with a clear message
- Auto-resubmits the saved data after re-authentication
- Also handles 401 on previous-week fetch (early redirect)

Additionally improves auth error logging to capture user email (decoded
from token payload), user agent, and country for better diagnostics.

repository.name: visitlogic-mvp

commit.message:
Fix retrieve_thesis missing active metadata (#1188)

* Fix 5 production bugs: VaR multiplier, stale prices, fill tasks, PRG guards

- Fix VaR dollar multiplier: use commodity profile lookup instead of raw
  IB c.multiplier (37500 → 375 for cents-quoted KC) in both FUT and FOP
  blocks
- Fix VaR stale prices: always compute B-S model price and cross-validate
  against IB market price; substitute when deviation >80% (catches
  FORCE_DELAYED_DATA returning averageCost)
- Fix fill task lifecycle: collect fill handler tasks and await them with
  15s timeout before releasing IB connection, preventing partial spread
  closes from orphaned CONTRADICT auto-close tasks
- Fix emergency cycle PRG guard: add PortfolioRiskGuard check after
  DrawdownGuard so emergency cycles respect account-wide HALT status
- Fix scheduled path position sync: call update_positions() from
  guarded_generate_orders using live TMS count, not just emergency path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Improve VaR $0 diagnostic: distinguish hedged portfolio from data issues

When VaR returns $0 with open positions, log scenario distribution
to distinguish genuinely hedged portfolios (all scenarios profitable)
from stale data issues. Reduces false alarm noise in logs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix retrieve_thesis to include metadata (active status) in returned dict

retrieve_thesis() was returning only the JSON document text, missing
ChromaDB metadata fields like 'active'. This caused _find_position_id_for_contract
to never find active thesis matches (thesis.get('active') always returned False),
falling back to FIFO which mapped legs to stale position_ids and inflated
the IBKR thesis group count.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
admin: fix STT/TTS health checks failing due to missing CORS headers

Health endpoints return 200 but without CORS headers, causing the browser
to block the response and throw a network error. Switch to no-cors mode so
the fetch resolves as long as the server is reachable, regardless of CORS.

Add ReBAR build script + full documentation for Dell 9010

Above 4G Decoding is now working on the Dell OptiPlex 9010 with warm
reboot support. Root cause was WarmBootPei triggering abbreviated boot
path that skipped 64-bit MMIO allocation. Fixed with JNE->JMP patch.

Added:
- build_rebar.pl: Full ReBAR build script (8 hex patches + 3 DSDT
  patches + IFR default + WarmBootPei fix + ReBarDxe injection)
- NEXT_STEPS.md: Instructions for running ReBarState.exe on the 9010
- Updated README with complete mod documentation and root cause analysis
- Updated DSDT investigation notes with resolved status

Remaining: Run ReBarState.exe with BAR size 32, reboot, verify GPU-Z.

chore(skills): add generate-tasks skill; update implement-spec to auto-invoke it

generate-tasks:
- New skill that generates a concrete, ordered task list from an approved spec
- Runs without disable-model-invocation so it can be spawned as a subagent
  via the Agent tool when needed

implement-spec:
- New Step 2 checks for a missing/empty Tasks section
- If tasks are absent, uses Agent tool to invoke generate-tasks automatically,

catch-all /api/notes/{note_id:path} route to avoid path conflicts.

directories for all discovered git repos in the workspace.

commit.message:
fix(intake): scope gatekeeper_doc_type priority to manual corrections only

Only use gatekeeper_doc_type → canonical_type chain when match_source
is "manual" (banker correction). Auto-confirmed docs stay on the
canonical_type → document_type → ai_doc_type chain, preventing
stale gatekeeper signals from overriding correct classifications.

commit.message:
fix: remove escaped quotes from zsh completion descriptions

Three descriptions were using escaped quotes (\") inside double-quoted
zsh array strings, causing parser errors:

1. --palette: 'All but \"custom\"' -> 'All but 'custom''
2. --yt-dlp-options: 'Examples: \"--no-warnings\" or...' -> 'Examples: --no-warnings or...'
3. --render-font: multiple '\"matrix\"' -> 'matrix' style quotes

Escaped quotes inside double-quoted zsh completion arrays are unnecessary
and cause zsh to report "corrections (errors: N)" messages. Removed all
escaped quotes - using single quotes or no quotes instead.

This fixes the three "corrections (errors)" warnings in zsh completion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix bogus 'Updated' timestamp and wrong scheduled update time

Two bugs:

1. database-postgres.js: updatedAt was read from the DB updated_at
   column which is set to NOW() on every savePlaylist call (including
   when the scheduler just advances nextUpdate). This caused the
   'Updated Mar 5, 2026, 09:51 AM' display even though no tracks
   were added. Now reads from playlist_data.updatedAt which is only
   written when tracks are actually added.

2. server.js calculateNextUpdate: timezone offset was subtracted
   instead of added. For 12:00 AM PST the scheduler was firing at
   8:00 AM PST (4 PM UTC) instead of midnight PST (8 AM UTC).
   Changed tempDate - offsetMs to tempDate + offsetMs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

CRITICAL: Fix SMS cron job JOIN relationships to enable automatic sending

🔧 Foreign Key Relationship Fix:
- Changed profiles!inner to profiles!review_requests_user_id_fkey
- Changed customers!inner to customers!review_requests_customer_id_fkey
- Explicit foreign key names ensure proper JOIN execution

🚨 Root Cause Identified:
- Debug endpoint showed 2 scheduled requests ready to send
- Complex JOIN query returned 0 results due to improper relationship syntax
- Simple queries worked, proving data exists but JOINs failed

✅ Expected Result:
- Cron job should now find and send the 2 overdue SMS requests
- Automatic SMS sending restored for future scheduled messages

🛠️ SMS System Status:
- Database: 2 scheduled requests waiting ✓
- Relationships: Now properly defined ✓
- Cron job: Ready to process messages ✓

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Mobile audio: use Web Audio API with gain-only chain, fix iOS volume control

GainNodes on mobile (no filters/reverb/delay) for proper per-stem

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: suppress bare space token at step 0 in chat/completions

Replaces the double-wrap hack (Assistant:\nAssistant:) with a proper
logit processor. The model generates space→EOS after "Assistant:" due
to training format; suppressing the bare space token (224) at step 0
forces a merged token like " The" which continues generation normally.

- Add SuppressTokensProcessor to logits_processor.py
- Add suppress_first_tokens field to OutputConstraints
- Auto-detect space token ID from tokenizer in chat handler

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Expand subtopics and keyword aliases for layman-friendly topic search

Adds 20 new subtopics (e.g. Grocery Prices, DOGE, Bullying, Drug Cartels,
TikTok Ban) and ~130 keyword aliases covering plain-English problems
("can't afford", "my rent"), current events (DOGE, mass deportation),
government acronyms (CDC, DOJ, ATF), brand names (Amazon, DoorDash),
and emotional language (evicted, laid off, scammed).

Also improves search by normalizing hyphens/spaces so "healthcare" matches
"Health Care", and boosting exact-alias matches so "ICE" surfaces
immigration results above incidental substring hits like "service".
